paper_title: A simple method for mitochondrial respiration and calcium uptake assessment in pollen tubes

methods.description: This method describes the process of germinating pollen tubes and counting them to prepare for mitochondrial respiration and calcium uptake experiments.

steps.description: Close the Eppendorf tube and gently stir at 60 rpm in an orbital shaker at 28 C for 2 h.
steps.searchable_summary: germinate pollen tubes by stirring in an orbital shaker

steps.description: Place 20mL of the suspension into the hematocytometer sample port and determine cell count by multiplying by the chamber predetermined factor.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen tubes using a hematocytometer

methods.description: This method involves permeabilizing pollen tubes and staining them to assess plasmalemma permeabilization.

steps.description: Samples were then washed twice in PTA buffer in order to remove excess calcium.
steps.searchable_summary: wash pollen tubes in PTA buffer to remove excess calcium

steps.description: Pollen tubes were then permeabilized with 0.01% digitonin or 0.5% DMSO (control) for 5 min and stained with 0.1% Evans Blue solution.
steps.searchable_summary: permeabilize and stain pollen tubes with digitonin/DMSO and Evans Blue

methods.description: This method assesses mitochondrial respiration in permeabilized pollen tubes using various inhibitors and measuring state 3 and state 4 respiration.

steps.description: 0.01% digitonin for five minutes inside the oxygraphs chamber and ADP was added to obtain state 3 respiration.
steps.searchable_summary: measure state 3 respiration in pollen tubes with digitonin and ADP

steps.description: Oligomycin addition resulted in a transient decrease in respiration typically associated with ADP phosphorylation blockade.
steps.searchable_summary: add oligomycin to assess ADP phosphorylation blockade

steps.description: Addition of 100 mM KCN significantly decreased state 3 respiration whereas subsequent addition of 500 mM SHAM resulted in no significant changes.
steps.searchable_summary: add KCN and SHAM to assess cytochrome oxidase and alternative oxidase inhibition
outputs: respiration data with KCN and SHAM

methods.description: This method assesses mitochondrial calcium uptake in permeabilized pollen tubes using a mini fluorimeter and calcium indicators.

steps.description: Mitochondrial calcium uptake was assessed by placing pollen tubes in a mini fluorimeter with constant stirring in the presence of 10 mM succinate and 2mM calcium green.
steps.searchable_summary: assess calcium uptake in pollen tubes with a mini fluorimeter

steps.description: A single pulse of 100mM CaCl2 was then added and fluorescence spiked to a maximum value followed by a constant fluorescence decrease indicating calcium transport.
steps.searchable_summary: add CaCl2 to measure calcium transport via fluorescence

steps.description: Under the same conditions, preincubation with 100 nM RuR significantly inhibited such fluorescence decrease, indicating calcium transport blockade.
steps.searchable_summary: preincubate with RuR to assess calcium transport inhibition
